name: yunomi
description: yunomi 🍵 — Human-in-the-loop approval gate for AI coding workflows. The AI serves its report; you review and approve. (formerly reviw)

scripts.test:v2: cd v2 && moon test --target js && moon build --target js --release && node --experimental-strip-types e2e/smoke.ts && node --experimental-strip-types e2e/media_sidebar_regression.ts && node --experimental-strip-types e2e/preview_interaction_regression.ts && node --experimental-strip-types e2e/media_discipline.ts && node --experimental-strip-types e2e/instant_skill.ts && node --experimental-strip-types e2e/session_hello.ts && node --experimental-strip-types e2e/tab_lifecycle.ts
scripts.prepack: npm run build && mkdir -p dist/server dist/ui && echo '#!/usr/bin/env node' > dist/server/server.js && cat v2/_build/js/release/build/server/server.js >> dist/server/server.js && chmod +x dist/server/server.js && cp v2/_build/js/release/build/ui/ui.js dist/ui/

author: kazuph
